zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Peche於1320年出生在英國瓦維其可爾喬姆利頓時，她的父親Sir John de Pêche II41歲，母親Alice Hayward35歲。她於1341年與Sir William de Colewick II在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1361年11月在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Peche于1320年出生在英国瓦維其可爾喬姆利頓时，她的父亲Sir John de Pêche II41岁，母亲Alice Hayward35岁。她于1341年与Sir William de Colewick II在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1361年11月在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Peche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a variant of   Pech   ‘pitch, tar’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Peče or of its Germanized form Petsche , which is also a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname.

variants.name: Pech
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Alvaro, Diego, Edelmira, Emilio, Francisco, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose Angel.  German Gerhard, Hans, Ilse, Lutz, Manfred, Wolf.

Czech and Slovak; Sorbian (Pěch and P'ech): from a pet form of the personal name Petr (Czech), Pětš (Lower Sorbian), and Peter (Slovak). This is also a Germanized form of the Upper Sorbian cognate Pjech.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German pech (German Pech) ‘pitch, tar’, presumably a nickname for someone with exceptionally dark skin or hair, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who prepared, sold, or used pitch. This may in part also be the origin of a homonymic Polish, Czech, and Slovak surname (compare above and below).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Peche was born in 1320, in Wormleighton, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir John de Pêche II, was 41 and her mother, Alice Hayward, was 35. She married Sir William de Colewick II in 1341, in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in November 1361, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Peche est née en 1320, à Wormleighton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Pêche II, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice Hayward, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Colewick II en 1341, à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en novembre 1361, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Peche 1320 in Wormleighton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Pêche II 41 und ihre Mutter Alice Hayward 35. Sie hat 1341 in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William de Colewick II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb im November 1361 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Peche è nata il nel 1320 nel Wormleighton, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Sir John de Pêche II, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Alice Hayward, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Sir William de Colewick II nel 1341, nel Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel novembre 1361, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Pecheが1320年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウオルムレイトンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Pêche IIは41歳，母Alice Haywardは35歳であった。1341年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムでSir William de Colewick IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1361年11月にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Peche(이)가 1320년 영국 워윅실르 워레이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Pêche II(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Hayward(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1341년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에서 Sir William de Colewick II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 11월 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Peche nasceu em 1320, em Wormleighton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Pêche II, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice Hayward, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Colewick II em 1341, em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em novembro de 1361, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Peche родилась в 1320 г. в местности вормлиитон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Pêche II было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Hayward, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Colewick II в 1341 г. в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла ноябрь 1361 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Peche nació en 1320, en Wormleighton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Pêche II, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Alice Hayward, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Sir William de Colewick II en 1341, en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en noviembre de 1361, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
